description: Manually-curated high-profile insider-trade cases. These are the canonical 'ground truth' anchors that the automated pipeline should rediscover and enrich. Each entry is the 'T1++ seed' — what we know about the case from published journalism.

cases.market_question: Will Nicolas Maduro exit office by January 31, 2026?
cases.event_description: US Operation Absolute Resolve captured Maduro from Caracas

cases.market_question: Google Year in Search rankings — Who will be most-searched person / people of 2025?
cases.event_description: Google announces Year in Search rankings; d4vd is most-searched
cases.notes: Previously won ~$150K predicting Gemini 3.0 Flash release date; 22-for-23 win rate on Google search markets; alleged by Meta engineer Jeong Haeju

cases.market_question: What day will Gemini 3.0 Flash be released?
cases.event_description: Gemini 3.0 Flash released on specific date
cases.notes: Same wallet as AlphaRaccoon Google Search case; earlier win, less public coverage

cases.market_question: Will there be US-Israeli strikes on Iran on February 28, 2026?
cases.event_description: US-Israeli strikes on Iran on Feb 28 2026
cases.notes: 38 linked accounts believed controlled by one person; netted $2M+; accounts funded from crypto transfers on Feb 22; on-chain analysis by Andrew 10 GWEI

cases.market_question: Will the U.S. conduct strikes against Iran?
cases.event_description: US strikes on Iran ~71 minutes after Magamyman's bet; odds were 17% at time of bet

cases.market_question: Will the US and Iran agree to a cease-fire?
cases.event_description: Trump announced ceasefire on Truth Social

cases.market_question: Will Trump win the 2024 US Presidential Election?
cases.notes: 11 accounts attributed to same French trader. Polymarket claimed no manipulation — but the scale is notable. We label it T1 but may re-classify as 'well-informed but not necessarily insider' in analysis.

cases.market_question: Who will win the 2025 Nobel Peace Prize?
cases.event_description: Machado wins 2025 Nobel Peace Prize; Norwegian Nobel Institute investigating leak
cases.notes: Machado odds jumped from 3.6% to 70%+ ~11 hours before announcement. Two other accounts also focused on Machado earned combined $90K. Technical mechanism hypothesis: the official portrait file on nobelprize.org had last-modified timestamp 07:18 GMT, ~1.5h before announcement, guessable URL pattern.

cases.market_question: Will Israel strike Iran in June 2025?
cases.event_description: Israeli opening strike on Iran in June 2025
cases.notes: Reservist Air Force major passed classified strike timing to civilian accomplice. Both indicted Feb 2026. Agreed to split the $162K profit evenly.

cases.market_question: Will Israel strike Yemen/Houthis in September 2025?
cases.event_description: Israeli strike in Yemen against Houthis
cases.notes: Same IAF reservist case as iaf_major_iran_june_2025; second known trade

cases.market_question: Will OpenAI release GPT-5.2 before December 13, 2025?
cases.notes: 13 wallets with zero activity, all opened within 40h of launch, bet $309K collectively. Detected by Unusual Whales.

cases.market_question: Will OpenAI release a new large model before December 13, 2025?
cases.notes: Four accounts, collective $13K profit. Smaller/less-specific than the 13-wallet case.

cases.market_question: Axiom prediction market (specific question not publicly named)
cases.notes: Three addresses, each exclusively trading one market, each making upwards of $100K. ZachXBT / Defioasis investigation.

cases.market_question: Kalshi market on a Survivor episode outcome (contestant-specific)
cases.notes: Kalshi head of enforcement said a Survivor market showed one contestant at 98% probability of elimination — out of 21 possible — before the episode aired, then that contestant was eliminated. Same pattern repeated in the following episode. Platform: Kalshi (not Polymarket).
